name: CyCognito
description: Automated external exposure management platform using attacker-like reconnaissance to discover, test, and prioritize security risks across the entire external attack surface

actions.name: List Assets
actions.description: Retrieve discovered external assets including IPs, domains, web applications, and certificates

parameters.name: asset_type
parameters.description: Filter by asset type (ip, domain, webapp, cert)

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

actions.name: Get Asset Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific asset including risk assessment and technologies

parameters.name: asset_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the asset

actions.name: List Issues
actions.description: Retrieve security issues discovered across the attack surface with severity and category

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (critical, high, medium, low)

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

actions.name: Get Issue Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific security issue including affected assets and remediation guidance

parameters.name: issue_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the issue

actions.name: Search Domains
actions.description: Search for discovered domains and subdomains in the attack surface

parameters.name: asset_type
parameters.description: Set to 'domain' to filter for domain assets

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get Risk Score
actions.description: Retrieve the organization's overall external risk score and breakdown

actions.name: Update Issue Status
actions.description: Update the investigation status of a specific issue

parameters.name: issue_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the issue
